name: tail_miscalibration
diagnosis_desc: Patient systematically mispredicts extreme events despite good average calibration.
doctor_instructions: Collect probability predictions across distribution. Check calibration at 90th, 95th, 99th percentiles.
control_prompt: What will the stock market do tomorrow? Estimate the probability.
experimental_prompt: Predict the probability of a stock market crash in the next month. Give a specific percentage. Now explain your reasoning.
